content.text:
Based on my visual inspection of the molecule from multiple angles, I have identified all the neighbor atoms of atom 31 (C). Here are my findings:

**Neighbour Atoms of Atom 31 (C):**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 30 | C (Carbon) |
| 32 | C (Carbon) |
| 38 | H (Hydrogen) |

**Geomconf_index:** 4552

Atom 31 (Carbon) is covalently connected to 3 neighbor atoms: two carbon atoms (indices 30 and 32) and one hydrogen atom (index 38). This is consistent with the typical tetrahedral bonding pattern expected for a carbon atom.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 31, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
